scripts.supabase:functions:deploy: npx -y supabase functions deploy poll-market-data && npx -y supabase functions deploy poll-edgar && npx -y supabase functions deploy poll-news && npx -y supabase functions deploy run-scanner && npx -y supabase functions deploy run-theme-engine && npx -y supabase functions deploy generate-brief
scripts.supabase:functions:check: npx -y deno-bin@latest check supabase/functions/poll-market-data/index.ts supabase/functions/run-theme-engine/index.ts supabase/functions/poll-edgar/index.ts supabase/functions/poll-news/index.ts supabase/functions/run-scanner/index.ts supabase/functions/generate-brief/index.ts
